reviews.review_title: Rip old game I used to play
reviews.review_description: I used to play this game every single day after I would come home from school excited to play it and it's sad to see this game fade away. This game was a huge game changer for many people and idk if anyone is even reading this but if you are then I just wanna say thank you for having a amazing experience like I did

reviews.review_title: I wish you were still here.
reviews.review_description:
19/11/24

Munkie: Explorers was an experience unlike any other, and it made me happier than any other game ever has. I now revisit the game using an APK provided by the owner, reflecting on the most memorable places in-game that have significantly impacted my life and shaped who I am today, both online and in my daily life. Additionally, I am an overpowered player in the owner's new game called Munkie: Deluxe. I enjoy spending time playing with the staff and connecting with anyone I know in Munkie: Deluxe. I miss it so much I want to get it back with multiplayer so I can relive moments that make me feel happy.

It's so sad 😭😭😭 I wasn't there to play the game but I am very sorry for the people that got to play the game and I am going to write a lot of RIPS :
